not_claimed: This does not prove new mathematics.
This does not prove novelty in cybersecurity.
This does not define a universal patching policy.
This does not replace exposure-aware vulnerability management.
This does not mean any critical CVE can be ignored.
Omega: vulnerability field with exploitation / threat-context attributes
D: patch-priority decision using KEV or EPSS threshold as additional context
operational_conclusion: CVSS base score alone is the wrong object for this patch-priority decision.
